title: Senior DevSecOps Engineer - São Paulo Based
description_text:
About Us

1GLOBAL is a technology-driven global mobile communications provider, delivering global connectivity solutions to enterprises and consumers. Powered by a best-in-class telecom platform – including its own owned and operated global mobile core network, fully fledged in-house developed eSIM technology, and an extensive portfolio of telecom licenses – 1GLOBAL operates as a fully regulated telecommunications provider across 40 countries worldwide.


We serve many of the world’s leading banks, enterprises, and digital-first businesses, including neo-banks, global fast moving consumer goods companies, travel leaders, and payment service providers. Today, 1GLOBAL connects more than 70 million people and devices globally, enabling our customers to launch, scale, and innovate with confidence in the mobile ecosystem.


1GLOBAL is a profitable, fast-growing business. With full-year revenues in 2025 exceeding US$200 million and profits of over US$25 million, we generate strong cash flows to fund our growth allowing us to continuously invest in infrastructure, platform innovation, and global expansion. Recent years have marked a defining phase in our journey, with major enterprise and mass-consumer client wins accelerating our evolution into a global mobile connectivity powerhouse, purpose-built to enable consumer brands to enter and succeed with their own  aspirations to offer telecommunications services to their clients.


Founded in 2022 by experienced technology entrepreneurs, Hakan Koç and Pyrros Koussios, 1GLOBAL has rapidly emerged as a European technology leader shaping the future of global telecommunications. We operate as a fully regulated Mobile Virtual Network Operator (MVNO) in 12 countries and as a regulated telecom operator in an additional 28 markets. Headquartered in the Netherlands, with world-class R&D hubs in Lisbon, Berlin, and São Paulo, our team of more than 500 experts across 16 countries is united by a single ambition: to redefine global mobile connectivity through technology, scale, and execution excellence.

About the Ideal Candidate

We are looking for a talented Senior DevSecOps / Cloud Security Engineer to join our Technology Department, with a focus on strengthening and automating our security posture across cloud and hybrid infrastructure. 

As a DevSecOps / Cloud Security Engineer, you will be responsible for embedding security into every stage of our infrastructure lifecycle, from design to deployment. You will lead the implementation of cloud-native security controls in AWS, harden Kubernetes environments, and drive best practices across CI/CD pipelines. Your role includes continuous vulnerability management, network protection, monitoring for threats, and working with development, DevOps and IP teams to ensure secure-by-default practices. You’ll also proactively identify risks, secure network perimeters, and automate remediation wherever possible. 


About the Role

  • Design, implement, and evolve scalable cloud security controls across AWS multi-account environments using security-as-code principles 
  • Own Kubernetes security architecture including workload isolation, RBAC, pod security standards, and network segmentation 
  • Embed security automation into CI/CD pipelines, including image scanning, IaC validation, and policy enforcement 
  • Continuously assess cloud and Kubernetes environments for vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, and emerging threats 
  • Design and maintain strong IAM and secrets management practices, enforcing least-privilege access 
  • Partner with DevOps, Platform, and IP/Network teams to deliver security controls as code and by design 
  • Analyze network traffic and security telemetry using flow logs, metrics, and targeted packet inspection where required 
  • Ensure alignment with internal security policies and external frameworks (CIS, NIST, ISO 27001, etc.) 
  • Produce and maintain clear documentation, including security architectures, runbooks, and incident response playbooks 
  • Act as a security champion, driving best practices, awareness, and secure engineering culture across teams 

Requirements

About You

  • A minimum of 3+ years Cloud Security / DevSecOps / Infrastructure Security 
  • Strong AWS security fundamentals (IAM, KMS, GuardDuty, Config, Security Hub) 
  • Solid Linux security and cloud networking fundamentals 
  • Hands-on Kubernetes security (RBAC, NetworkPolicies, pod security, image scanning) 
  • Infrastructure as Code (Terraform) and Git-based workflows 
  • Scripting for automation (Python or Go or Bash) 
  • Experience with vulnerability management and container security 
  • Security-first mindset with strong troubleshooting skills 
  • Experience with WAFs and cloud DDoS protection 
  • Comfortable with packet inspection, flow analysis, and traffic monitoring (tcpdump, Wireshark, Suricata, etc.)

Benefits

What we offer?

  • CLT contract — enjoy job stability and reliable benefits that value your work
  • Quarterly performance bonuses to reward your hard work and achievements
  • Meal allowance paid into Caju card — R$100 per working day
  • Extended parental leave — 180 days of maternity leave and 20 days of paternity leave
  • Health insurance with SulAmérica — 50% covered by the company
  • Daycare allowance provided to mothers with children under 3 years old — R$500 per month per child

Why 1GLOBAL?

  • Growth Opportunities: Advance your career in one of the fastest growing telecommunications companies, expanding over 100% year-on-year under the leadership of successful tech entrepreneurs.
  • Major Transaction Exposure: Be in the driver’s seat for transactions that will have an impact on the future telco industry.
  • Work with a Talented Team: From the Board and the Founders to the Senior Management Team, you will collaborate daily with the most capable and renowned external advisors, and constantly being exposed to talented and driven individuals.
  • Dynamic Work Environment: Thrive in a collaborative, fast-paced workplace where innovation is encouraged, and every contribution counts.
  • Professional Development: Work alongside industry experts to enhance your skills and knowledge in a cutting-edge field.
  • International Experience: Gain opportunities to work in different 1GLOBAL offices around the world as you grow within the company.
  • Open Communication Culture: Join a team where your ideas are heard, and open dialogue is encouraged, fostering a supportive and transparent work environment.
  • Get Things Done Attitude: Be part of a results-driven team that values efficiency, creativity, and the drive to make a tangible impact in the industry.


1GLOBAL is an equal opportunity employer, we value your character as much as your talent. Diversity drives our innovation, and we offer a collaborative, dynamic, and international work environment. We are excited for you to join our mission to revolutionise connectivity globally.

title: Retail Sales Associate
description_text:
Retail Sales Associate

Join our winning team, 1915 South, as a Retail Sales Associate. 1915 South owns and operates 30 Ashley stores and 3 distribution centers across the southeast, including locations in Georgia, Florida, Alabama, North Carolina, Mississippi, and Virginia. Our company is focused on employee growth and development, providing exceptional customer service and being passionate about what we do! If you want to take your career to a new level of professional success with the #1 Furniture Brand in the world, complete an application with us today!

Position Summary:

The Retail Sales Associate (RSA) is responsible for delivering an exceptional guest shopping experience by building relationships, understanding guest needs, and presenting solutions that create value. This role focuses on connection, service, and follow-up while consistently meeting minimum performance standards through key performance indicators (KPIs).

Job Duties:

·         Greet and assist guests throughout their shopping journey.

·         Present products and solutions that create value for all guests.

·         Meet or exceed minimum performance standards and KPIs, including sales, finance, bedding, protection, and delivery.

·         Follow established selling processes and best practices.

·         Actively participate in coaching, training, and development opportunities.

·         Conduct timely and consistent customer follow-up to support the sales process and guest satisfaction.

·         Review orders for accuracy prior to submission.

·         Take payments and assist guests with financing or payment options.

·         Partner with leadership and support teams to resolve guest questions or concerns.

·         Maintain store cleanliness and organization through assigned areas of responsibility.

Required Qualifications:

·         Education: High school diploma or equivalent, required.

·         Experience: Retail sales, specifically furniture, preferred.

Physical and Work Environment Requirements:

·         Physical Demands: Standing/walking for extended periods; occasional lifting.

·         Work Environment: Retail Sales Floor

·         Schedule: Weekdays, Weekends, and Holidays, as required.

Why 1915 South?

·         Compensation: Competitive commission-based pay with performance bonuses

·         Benefits: Comprehensive benefits package for you and your family, including medical, dental, vision, disability, and life insurance

·         Paid Time Off: Paid vacation and sick leave

·         Retirement: 401(k) retirement plan with company matching contributions

·         Tuition Assistance: College tuition support through Thomas University

·         Employee Discounts: Generous employee discounts on furniture

·         Career Development: Long-term career advancement opportunities with a strong promote-from-within culture. Many of our leaders at 1915 South began their careers here- when you join us, you’re not just taking a job, you’re building a future!

As a Network Engineering member, in the Voice and Services functional area, you will be responsible to propose, analyze and define the requirements for new and existing services and systems, related with the voice systems under the responsibility of the functional area. Prepare, design, test and provide new solutions or product changes of the already existing portfolio. Define and support the technology evolution roadmap for the systems under the functional area. Participate and support the other functional areas in cross functional projects.

About the Role

  • Collaboration with other Networks teams in defining and managing the projects for delivery of new solutions
  • Project delivery. Network design. Integration and migration strategy definition. Collaboration with other relevant departments. Responsible for end-to-end delivery
  • Design of new consumer and corporate telecom solutions
  • Creation of technical documentation (HLD’s, LLD’s, WO’s, etc.) and maintain it over the lifecycle of the solutions
  • Perform implementations in live environment. Understanding of End to End system testing requirements
  • Follow-up and define Quality and Performance indicators
  • Capacity and Performance Analysis, Reporting and Improvement Solution Definition
  • Service & Resource configuration definition and implementation on requested systems
  • Work on complex solutions that influence the design of current products and addresses design issues for future products or technologies
  • Close relationship with external partners like carriers, service providers
  • Elaborate, and manage the process, for change requests to current partners in order to meet the network necessities
  • Control the network elements roadmap, being responsible for the necessary software/hardware upgrade during the components lifecycle
  • Generate and implement process improvements, including and especially cross-team processes
  • Documents the existing technology portfolio and proposes recommendations for improvements and/or alternatives

Requirements

About You

Must Have

  • Proven experience on implementation of live solutions on mobile telecom (GSM, UMTS, LTE, IMS), networks design, capacity management, engineering and architecture
  • Knowledge of 3GPP, GSMA, ITU standards and specifications
  • Experience in the design, test and operation of NGN based networks, including MSS/MGW, HLR/HSS, SBC
  • Experience in defining, establishing and maintaining voice interconnects, SIP/RTP based
  • Understanding about IMS architecture. Knowledge about VoIP, VoLTE, VoWiFi, and QoS
  • Experience with SMS service configuration and routing
  • IMS Architecture with understanding of IMS nodes including P/S/I-CSCF, Application Servers
  • IMS Protocol Interfaces – Gm Interface, ISC interface, Sh Interface, Cx, SOAP/XML, etc.
  • Experience in mobile services charging (offline, online). Knowledge and experience of OCS and, Ro, Ro+, Ga and Bp interfaces
  • Knowledge and experience with Diameter/SCTP networks and protocol
  • Knowledge and experience with Signaling Gateways and protocols including SS7, SIGTRAN, MAP and CAMEL
  • Experience with protocol analyzer tools like Wireshark, Astelia, and ability to use them to troubleshoot networks errors/problems for the mentioned protocols
  • Experience with ETSI NFV architecture and solutions
  • Familiar with MVNO/MVNE/MVNA architecture(s) and landscape
  • English proficiency mandatory, other languages are a plus

Nice to Have

  • +3 years working on telecoms, designing and implementing mobile core networks

title: Senior Site Reliability Engineer (SRE)
description_text:
About Us
1GLOBAL is a technology-driven global mobile communications provider, delivering global connectivity solutions to enterprises and consumers. Recent years have marked a defining phase in our journey, with major enterprise and mass-consumer client wins accelerating our evolution into a global mobile connectivity powerhouse, purpose-built to enable consumer brands to enter and succeed with their own  aspirations to offer telecommunications services to their clients.


Founded in 2022 by experienced technology entrepreneurs, Hakan Koç and Pyrros Koussios, 1GLOBAL has rapidly emerged as a European technology leader shaping the future of global telecommunications. We operate as a fully regulated Mobile Virtual Network Operator (MVNO) in 12 countries and as a regulated telecom operator in an additional 28 markets. Headquartered in the Netherlands, with world-class R&D hubs in Lisbon, Berlin, and São Paulo, our team of more than 500 experts across 16 countries is united by a single ambition: to redefine global mobile connectivity through technology, scale, and execution excellence.

About the Ideal Candidate

We are looking for a talented Senior Site Reliability Engineer (SRE) to join our Technology Department. We are open to hiring this role in Berlin, Germany. 

As a Senior SRE, you will be a senior individual contributor responsible for strengthening the stability, scalability, and reliability of our global infrastructure and services across both cloud and on-prem environments. You will work alongside SREs under the guidance of the SRE Team Lead, taking ownership of critical reliability domains and helping drive a data-driven reliability culture based on SLIs, SLOs, and error budgets.

Your mission will be to proactively identify weaknesses across systems and improve reliability through redundancy testing, automation, and observability. You will design, build, and operate the tools and processes that automatically detect, prevent, and recover from incidents, ensuring our services remain reliable and performant for customers around the world. 

This role collaborates closely with DevOps, Infrastructure, IP Network, and Security teams to maintain carrier-grade reliability standards across all layers of our platform.


About the Role

  • Act as a senior technical contributor within the SRE team, mentoring peers and setting the technical bar for reliability engineering. 
  • Define, measure, and maintain SLIs and SLOs for core infrastructure and customer-facing services. 
  • Plan and execute redundancy and resilience testing across service, infrastructure, and networking layers — validating failover, HA configurations, and disaster recovery readiness. 
  • Design and implement automated recovery mechanisms, self-healing workflows, and intelligent alerting systems. 
  • Drive incident response, root-cause analysis, and blameless post-mortems, and ensure implementation and tracking of corrective and preventive actions derived from them to achieve continuous improvement. 
  • Develop and enhance observability (metrics, logs, traces) using Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, and OpenTelemetry. 
  • Partner with Infrastructure and DevOps teams to ensure deployment safety, rollback policies, and configuration consistency. 
  • Proactively identify weaknesses through fault-injection, load, and chaos testing. 
  • Continuously reduce operational toil through automation and reliability tooling. 
  • Contribute to on-call practices, improving alert quality, runbooks, escalation procedures, and incident management processes. 
  • Perform capacity planning, performance benchmarking, and resilience audits across systems. 
  • Ensure compliance with security, reliability, and availability standards. 
  • Create and maintain internal documentation, playbooks, and operational guidelines for peers and users. 
  • Contribute to cloud cost-optimization initiatives, including reserved capacity planning, autoscaling design, storage tiering, workload right-sizing, and continuous anomaly detection.

Requirements

About You

Must-haves

  • A minimum of 5 years of experience in Site Reliability, Systems, or Infrastructure Engineering (including 2+ years in a dedicated SRE role). 
  • Strong expertise in Linux systems engineering, distributed systems, and networking. 
  • Proven experience building and running high-availability, mission-critical production systems. 
  • Hands-on experience with redundancy and failover testing, disaster recovery, and high-availability architecture validation. 
  • Deep understanding of monitoring, observability, and incident management principles.
  • Experience with Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Thanos, and OpenTelemetry or similar tools. 
  • Proficiency in Python, Go, and Bash for automation and reliability tooling. 
  • Strong knowledge of Kubernetes, container orchestration, and service mesh architectures. 
  • Experience with AWS (EKS, EC2, VPC) and on-premises infrastructure integration. 
  • Proficiency in Infrastructure as Code tools such as Terraform. 
  • Understanding of networking fundamentals (routing, load balancing, BGP, DNS, VXLAN, etc.). 
  • Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills, capable of operating under pressure. 
  • Strong communication and collaboration skills across distributed and cross-functional teams.


Nice-to-haves

  • Experience in telecom, carrier-grade, or large-scale distributed systems environments.
  • Hands-on experience with chaos engineering and automated failure-scenario validation (e.g., simulating link or node failures).
  • Strong understanding of high-availability networking concepts.
  • Background in capacity planning, traffic engineering, and multi-region failover.
  • Experience building reliability dashboards and integrating SRE metrics into business KPIs or compliance reports.
  • Familiarity with security and resilience standards (ISO 27001, NIST SP 800-53).

Benefits

Why 1GLOBAL?

  • Growth Opportunities: Advance your career in one of the fastest growing telecommunications companies, expanding over 100% year-on-year under the leadership of successful tech entrepreneurs.
  • Major Transaction Exposure: Be in the driver’s seat for transactions that will have an impact on the future telco industry.
  • Work with a Talented Team: From the Board and the Founders to the Senior Management Team, you will collaborate daily with the most capable and renowned external advisors, and constantly being exposed to talented and driven individuals.
  • Dynamic Work Environment: Thrive in a collaborative, fast-paced workplace where innovation is encouraged, and every contribution counts.
  • Professional Development: Work alongside industry experts to enhance your skills and knowledge in a cutting-edge field.
  • International Experience: Gain opportunities to work in different 1GLOBAL offices around the world as you grow within the company.
  • Open Communication Culture: Join a team where your ideas are heard, and open dialogue is encouraged, fostering a supportive and transparent work environment.
  • Get Things Done Attitude: Be part of a results-driven team that values efficiency, creativity, and the drive to make a tangible impact in the industry.

Founded in 2022 by experienced technology entrepreneurs, Hakan Koç and Pyrros Koussios, 1GLOBAL has rapidly emerged as a European technology leader shaping the future of global telecommunications. We operate as a fully regulated Mobile Virtual Network Operator (MVNO) in 12 countries and as a regulated telecom operator in an additional 28 markets. Headquartered in the Netherlands, with world-class R&D hubs in Lisbon, Berlin, and São Paulo, our team of more than 500 experts across 16 countries is united by a single ambition: to redefine global mobile connectivity through technology, scale, and execution excellence.

About the Team

We are looking for a Network Operations Intern to join our Networks Operations team, part of the wider Service Assurance function. This team acts as a 2nd line technical support team, working closely with Customer Services, Customer Success, Engineering, Product, vendors, and NOC teams to troubleshoot and resolve customer-impacting network issues.

You will support the investigation of customer complaints and operational incidents across services such as registration, voice, data, and SMS. This is a hands-on learning role for someone who wants to build practical experience in telecom operations, incident handling, network troubleshooting, and service assurance.

The ideal candidate is organised, analytical, curious, and calm under pressure. You should be comfortable following guidance from experienced engineers and remote teams, while also being proactive in learning, documenting, and communicating clearly.

About the Role

  • Support the investigation and troubleshooting of customer complaints related to registration, voice, data, SMS, and connectivity services.
  • Assist the Networks Operations team with daily case handling, monitoring, and incident follow-up.
  • Help analyse network faults using diagnostic tools, monitoring platforms, logs, and protocol traces.
  • Learn and support troubleshooting across telecom signalling flows such as SS7, MAP, ISUP, SIP, CAP, DIAMETER, and related network procedures.
  • Escalate complex or high-impact issues to senior engineers, Engineering teams, vendors, or NOC teams with clear and accurate context.
  • Maintain accurate records of incidents, troubleshooting steps, resolutions, and follow-up actions.
  • Support incident response activities, including impact assessment, updates, and post-incident documentation.

Requirements

About You

Must-haves

title: Senior Software Engineer - Network Automation
description_text:
About Us

1GLOBAL is a technology-driven global mobile communications provider, delivering global connectivity solutions to enterprises and consumers. Powered by a best-in-class telecom platform – including its own owned and operated global mobile core network, fully fledged in-house developed eSIM technology, and an extensive portfolio of telecom licenses – 1GLOBAL operates as a fully regulated telecommunications provider across 40 countries worldwide.


We serve many of the world’s leading banks, enterprises, and digital-first businesses, including neo-banks, global fast moving consumer goods companies, travel leaders, and payment service providers. Today, 1GLOBAL connects more than 70 million people and devices globally, enabling our customers to launch, scale, and innovate with confidence in the mobile ecosystem.


1GLOBAL is a profitable, fast-growing business. With full-year revenues in 2025 exceeding US$200 million and profits of over US$25 million, we generate strong cash flows to fund our growth allowing us to continuously invest in infrastructure, platform innovation, and global expansion. Recent years have marked a defining phase in our journey, with major enterprise and mass-consumer client wins accelerating our evolution into a global mobile connectivity powerhouse, purpose-built to enable consumer brands to enter and succeed with their own  aspirations to offer telecommunications services to their clients.


Founded in 2022 by experienced technology entrepreneurs, Hakan Koç and Pyrros Koussios, 1GLOBAL has rapidly emerged as a European technology leader shaping the future of global telecommunications. We operate as a fully regulated Mobile Virtual Network Operator (MVNO) in 12 countries and as a regulated telecom operator in an additional 28 markets. Headquartered in the Netherlands, with world-class R&D hubs in Lisbon, Berlin, and São Paulo, our team of close to 500 experts across 15 countries is united by a single ambition: to redefine global mobile connectivity through technology, scale, and execution excellence.

About the Team

We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our Network Automation Unit in Sydney, Australia. This is a software-first role focused on turning complex network and telecom workflows into reliable internal platforms, automation systems, and test capabilities.

You will work closely with telco teams to understand real operational problems, build a strong technical context, break down ambiguous work, and deliver safely. You will also work in an AI-assisted engineering environment where engineers remain accountable for understanding the problem, reviewing outputs critically, and validating the result end-to-end.


About the Role

  • Work directly with telco teams to understand problems, workflows, and constraints 
  • Investigate systems, repos, tickets, and runtime behavior 
  • Build reliable knowledge bases that capture how complex systems actually work 
  • Design reliable technical solutions for operational and automation problems 
  • Break down ambiguous work into clear tickets, execution steps, and validation plans 
  • Use AI-assisted workflows to speed up research, implementation, and delivery 
  • Review AI-generated code critically for correctness, quality, and production safety 
  • Deliver changes to staging and validate them through integration and end-to-end testing 

Requirements

About You

  • Senior-level experience building backend, platform, automation, or internal tooling 
  • A software-first mindset and comfort working in operationally complex domains 
  • Strong technical judgment, especially when reviewing AI-generated output 
  • Experience turning ambiguous problems into structured investigations and executable plans 
  • Strong knowledge of AWS infrastructure and cloud services
  • Working knowledge of Python and TypeScript, so you can review and guide implementation 
  • Experience building or maintaining CI/CD pipelines, for example, GitLab CI 
  • Working knowledge of SQL, ideally PostgreSQL 
  • Bonus points for telecom or network systems experience

Benefits

Why 1GLOBAL?

  • Growth Opportunities: Advance your career in one of the fastest growing telecommunications companies, expanding over 100% year-on-year under the leadership of successful tech entrepreneurs.
  • Major Transaction Exposure: Be in the driver’s seat for transactions that will have an impact on the future telco industry.

  • Professional Development: Work alongside industry experts to enhance your skills and knowledge in a cutting-edge field.
  • International Experience: Gain opportunities to work in different 1GLOBAL offices around the world as you grow within the company.
  • Open Communication Culture: Join a team where your ideas are heard, and open dialogue is encouraged, fostering a supportive and transparent work environment.
  • Get Things Done Attitude: Be part of a results-driven team that values efficiency, creativity, and the drive to make a tangible impact in the industry.

title: Customer Success Manager - Federal
description_text:
🌐 About 1Kosmos

1Kosmos enables secure, user-controlled digital identities for citizens, customers, and workforces. Through advanced passwordless authentication and identity verification, our platform reduces fraud, secures access, and simplifies identity management at scale.

We’re trusted by leading organizations across government, telecom, retail, banking, and tech, and are now expanding our federal footprint with a focus on impactful partnerships and mission-critical use cases.

🎯 Role Overview

We are seeking a Customer Success Manager (CSM) to join our high-growth team with a focus on the federal government sector. This role is critical to ensuring adoption, engagement, and value realization for public sector agencies deploying the 1Kosmos platform.

The CSM will work closely with federal program stakeholders, security/compliance teams, and our internal Implementation, Product, and Support functions to deliver exceptional onboarding, support, and expansion outcomes.

This is a 6-month contract role with a strong opportunity to convert into a full-time permanent position, based on performance and federal program growth.

🧩 Key Responsibilities

🔐 Customer Engagement & Success

·       • Own the post-sales relationship with federal customers, ensuring successful onboarding and long-term adoption.

·       • Drive user engagement and manage project milestones through onboarding, enablement, and early usage.

·       • Serve as the primary point of contact for federal agency stakeholders (IT, InfoSec, program managers).

·       • Ensure delivery aligns with customer security, compliance, and operational needs (e.g., FedRAMP, FIPS, NIST 800-63).

·       • Partner with Implementations to track timelines, proactively identify risks, and remove blockers.

·       Monitor usage, identify adoption gaps, and lead regular business reviews.

·       Advocate for customer needs internally and identify upsell or expansion opportunities as trust deepens.

·       Become an expert in 1Kosmos identity offerings and how they align with federal digital identity mandates (e.g., Executive Order 14028, Zero Trust architecture).

·       • Share best practices and thought leadership with federal stakeholders.

Requirements

Qualifications

Required:

·       U.S. Citizen (mandatory for federal work)

·       3–7 years of experience in Customer Success, Program Management, or Federal Account Management

·       Experience working with U.S. federal agencies (civilian or defense), either directly or as a vendor

·       Experience at an identity, cybersecurity, or SaaS platform company

·       Strong communication and relationship-building skills with technical and non-technical stakeholders

·       Ability to project manage complex onboarding/deployments across functions

·       Comfortable with identity/security concepts: SSO, MFA, PKI, FIDO2, FedRAMP, Zero Trust

Preferred:

·       Understanding of federal procurement and compliance (ATO, TIC 3.0, ICAM frameworks)

·       Previous experience in startup/growth-stage environment

·       Ability to obtain a Top Secret/SCI clearance is required; active clearance strongly preferred.

Benefits

Why Join Now?

·       Join a mission-driven company transforming how federal agencies secure identity

·       Influence a fast-growing federal portfolio and help shape our approach to public sector partnerships

·       Work cross-functionally with leaders across Product, Engineering, and Security

·       Be part of a collaborative, values-driven team making real impact

description_text:

We are looking for a talented Senior DevSecOps / Cloud Security Engineer to join our Technology Department, with a focus on strengthening and automating our security posture across cloud and hybrid infrastructure. 


As a DevSecOps / Cloud Security Engineer, you will be responsible for embedding security into every stage of our infrastructure lifecycle, from design to deployment. You will lead the implementation of cloud-native security controls in AWS, harden Kubernetes environments, and drive best practices across CI/CD pipelines. Your role includes continuous vulnerability management, network protection, monitoring for threats, and working with development, DevOps and IP teams to ensure secure-by-default practices. You’ll also proactively identify risks, secure network perimeters, and automate remediation wherever possible.
This role can be based in our Berlin, Lisbon, or Warsaw offices. Relocation is required if you are not currently based in one of these cities.

About the Role

  • Design, implement, and evolve scalable cloud security controls across AWS multi-account environments using security-as-code principles
  • Own Kubernetes security architecture including workload isolation, RBAC, pod security standards, and network segmentation
  • Embed security automation into CI/CD pipelines, including image scanning, IaC validation, and policy enforcement
  • Continuously assess cloud and Kubernetes environments for vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, and emerging threats
  • Design and maintain strong IAM and secrets management practices, enforcing least-privilege access
  • Partner with DevOps, Platform, and IP/Network teams to deliver security controls as code and by design
  • Analyze network traffic and security telemetry using flow logs, metrics, and targeted packet inspection where required
  • Ensure alignment with internal security policies and external frameworks (CIS, NIST, ISO 27001, etc.)
  • Produce and maintain clear documentation, including security architectures, runbooks, and incident response playbooks
  • Act as a security champion, driving best practices, awareness, and secure engineering culture across teams

Requirements

About You

  • A minimum of 3+ years of experience with Cloud Security / DevSecOps / Infrastructure Security 
  • Strong AWS security fundamentals (IAM, KMS, GuardDuty, Config, Security Hub) 
  • Solid Linux security and cloud networking fundamentals 
  • Hands-on Kubernetes security (RBAC, NetworkPolicies, pod security, image scanning) 
  • Infrastructure as Code (Terraform) and Git-based workflows 
  • Scripting for automation (Python or Go or Bash) 
  • Experience with vulnerability management and container security 
  • Security-first mindset with strong troubleshooting skills 
  • Experience with WAFs and cloud DDoS protection 
  • Comfortable with packet inspection, flow analysis, and traffic monitoring (tcpdump, Wireshark, Suricata, etc.)

title: Senior Creative

title: R&D Lead
description_text:
R&D Lead

The Lead of R&D will spearhead technology discovery, applied research, and technical innovation across backend, APIs,

web, mobile, cloud, and emerging platforms. This role focuses on identifying, validating, and de-risking new technologies

and enabling their transition into product engineering teams.

This position does not own day-to-day product engineering or feature delivery but works closely with Product Engineering

to influence future platforms and architectures.

Experience Level: 12+ yrs

Skillset Required: Docker, Kubernetes, DevSecOps, CI/CD pipeline, Expertise in one or more of: Java, Node.js, Go

(Golang), C / C++, JavaScript / TypeScript

Key Responsibilities

• Lead technology research and discovery initiatives across backend systems, APIs, web, mobile, cloud, and emerging

domains.

• Identify, evaluate, and prototype emerging technologies, tools, frameworks, and architectural patterns relevant to

the company’s strategic roadmap.

• Drive proof-of-concept (PoC), spike solutions, and experimental platforms to validate feasibility, scalability, security,

and performance.

• Establish structured research → validation → handoff model to transition successful innovations to Product

Engineering teams.

• Act as a technical thought leader, influencing long-term architecture, platform evolution, and build-vs-buy decisions.

• Partner with Product Management, Product Engineering, Security, and QA teams to ensure research outcomes align

with business and compliance needs.

• Ensure research outcomes adhere to security, quality, regulatory, and compliance standards from inception.

• Track industry trends, academic research, open-source ecosystems, and startup innovations to maintain a

competitive technology edge.

• Define success metrics for R&D initiatives and regularly communicate outcomes to executive stakeholders.

Requirements

Required Skills and Experience

• 12+ years of experience in R&D, applied research, platform engineering, or innovation leadership.

• Proven experience leading cross-functional technical research teams and exploratory initiatives.

• Strong background in distributed systems, cloud-native architectures, and modern application stacks.

• Demonstrated ability to translate research and experimentation into production-adoptable solutions.

• Excellent leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills.

• Experience managing multiple concurrent research tracks with varying levels of maturity.

• Deep understanding of multi-cloud and hybrid cloud strategies (AWS, Azure, GCP).

• Ability to review, guide, and influence production-level code without being the primary implementer.

• Strong architectural judgment with a security-first mindset.

Good-to-Have Qualifications

• Experience establishing R&D best practices, including experimentation frameworks and technical evaluation

criteria.

• Familiarity with DevSecOps principles, CI/CD pipelines, and secure software supply chains.

• Hands-on expertise in one or more of:

• Java

• Node.js

• Go (Golang)

• C / C++

• JavaScript / TypeScript

• Experience with containers and orchestration: Docker, Kubernetes.

• Exposure to identity, security, cryptography, or authentication technologies (strong plus).

title: Customer Service Agent - French Speaker
description_text:
About Us

1GLOBAL is a technology-driven global mobile communications provider, delivering global connectivity solutions to enterprises and consumers. Powered by a best-in-class telecom platform – including its own owned and operated global mobile core network, fully fledged in-house developed eSIM technology, and an extensive portfolio of telecom licenses – 1GLOBAL operates as a fully regulated telecommunications provider across 40 countries worldwide.


We serve many of the world’s leading banks, enterprises, and digital-first businesses, including neo-banks, global fast moving consumer goods companies, travel leaders, and payment service providers. Today, 1GLOBAL connects more than 70 million people and devices globally, enabling our customers to launch, scale, and innovate with confidence in the mobile ecosystem.


1GLOBAL is a profitable, fast-growing business. With full-year revenues in 2025 exceeding US$200 million and profits of over US$25 million, we generate strong cash flows to fund our growth allowing us to continuously invest in infrastructure, platform innovation, and global expansion. Recent years have marked a defining phase in our journey, with major enterprise and mass-consumer client wins accelerating our evolution into a global mobile connectivity powerhouse, purpose-built to enable consumer brands to enter and succeed with their own  aspirations to offer telecommunications services to their clients.


Founded in 2022 by experienced technology entrepreneurs, Hakan Koç and Pyrros Koussios, 1GLOBAL has rapidly emerged as a European technology leader shaping the future of global telecommunications. We operate as a fully regulated Mobile Virtual Network Operator (MVNO) in 12 countries and as a regulated telecom operator in an additional 28 markets. Headquartered in the Netherlands, with world-class R&D hubs in Lisbon, Berlin, and São Paulo, our team of close to 500 experts across 16 countries is united by a single ambition: to redefine global mobile connectivity through technology, scale, and execution excellence.


About the Team

Become part of our dynamic, highly dedicated and multi-lingual team of Customer Service Agents! We provide telephone and online services support in German, Spanish, Polish, Dutch, French, and English to our business customers, from Monday to Friday.

Currently, we're looking for a talented individual to join our French support team. Business Proficiency in English is also essential as it's our primary business language.

We are open to hiring candidates in São Paulo.


About the Role

  • Acting as first-line support to our customers – aiming to solve their technical queries by phone and email;
  • Tracking, collating and responding to customer issues within agreed timescales;
  • Escalating and liaising with our Technical Support (TS) in Portugal for more complicated cases;
  • Working closely with Service Account Managers to help develop, grow and retain customer accounts.

Requirements

About You

  • Thorough working knowledge of Microsoft Office, ticketing systems and customer service procedures.
  • Knowledge of supporting GSM - preferred.
  • A professional telephone manner and call management skills.
  • Outstanding written and verbal skills in French are required.
  • Excellent written and verbal English skills – able to take technical information and translate it into easily understandable language for customers.
  • Exceptional customer relationship management skills – including handling complaints effectively.
  • Good teamwork, organizational and time management skills.
  • Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.
  • Good attention to detail and the ability to understand and follow technical processes accurately.
  • You may have gained this experience by working, for example, in Helpdesk, Customer Service or Call Centre roles; Mobile Handset support roles; the Telecoms sector: both GSM and VoIP.
  • Availability to work Monday to Friday, adjusting the schedule accordingly to Daylight Saving Time – Winter from 5am to 2pm, Summer from 4am to 1pm, Brasília time.

Benefits

What We Offer?

  • CLT contract — enjoy job stability and reliable benefits that value your work
  • Quarterly performance bonuses to reward your hard work and achievements
  • Meal allowance paid into Caju card — R$100 per working day
  • Health insurance with SulAmérica — 50% covered by the company
  • Extended parental leave - 180 days of maternity leave and 20 days of paternity leave.
  • Daycare allowance provided to mothers with children under 3 years old — R$500 per month per child

Why 1GLOBAL?

  • Growth Opportunities: Advance your career in one of the fastest growing telecommunications companies, expanding over 100% year-on-year under the leadership of successful tech entrepreneurs.
  • Major Transaction Exposure: Be in the driver’s seat for transactions that will have an impact on the future telco industry.
  • Work with a Talented Team: From the Board and the Founders to the Senior Management Team, you will collaborate daily with the most capable and renowned external advisors, and constantly being exposed to talented and driven individuals.
  • Dynamic Work Environment: Thrive in a collaborative, fast-paced workplace where innovation is encouraged, and every contribution counts.
  • Professional Development: Work alongside industry experts to enhance your skills and knowledge in a cutting-edge field.
  • International Experience: Gain opportunities to work in different 1GLOBAL offices around the world as you grow within the company.
  • Open Communication Culture: Join a team where your ideas are heard, and open dialogue is encouraged, fostering a supportive and transparent work environment.
  • Get Things Done Attitude: Be part of a results-driven team that values efficiency, creativity, and the drive to make a tangible impact in the industry.


1GLOBAL is an equal opportunity employer, we value your character as much as your talent. Diversity drives our innovation, and we offer a collaborative, dynamic, and international work environment. We are excited for you to join our mission to revolutionise connectivity globally.

title: Team Lead - AI Engineering
description_text:
About Us

1GLOBAL is a technology-driven global mobile communications provider, delivering global connectivity solutions to enterprises and consumers. Powered by a best-in-class telecom platform – including its own owned and operated global mobile core network, fully fledged in-house developed eSIM technology, and an extensive portfolio of telecom licenses – 1GLOBAL operates as a fully regulated telecommunications provider across 40 countries worldwide.


We serve many of the world’s leading banks, enterprises, and digital-first businesses, including neo-banks, global fast moving consumer goods companies, travel leaders, and payment service providers. 1GLOBAL is a profitable, fast-growing business. With full-year revenues in 2025 exceeding US$200 million and profits of over US$25 million, we generate strong cash flows to fund our growth allowing us to continuously invest in infrastructure, platform innovation, and global expansion. Recent years have marked a defining phase in our journey, with major enterprise and mass-consumer client wins accelerating our evolution into a global mobile connectivity powerhouse, purpose-built to enable consumer brands to enter and succeed with their own  aspirations to offer telecommunications services to their clients.


Founded in 2022 by experienced technology entrepreneurs, Hakan Koç and Pyrros Koussios, 1GLOBAL has rapidly emerged as a European technology leader shaping the future of global telecommunications. We operate as a fully regulated Mobile Virtual Network Operator (MVNO) in 12 countries and as a regulated telecom operator in an additional 28 markets. Headquartered in the Netherlands, with world-class R&D hubs in Lisbon, Berlin, and São Paulo, our team of close to 500 experts across 15 countries is united by a single ambition: to redefine global mobile connectivity through technology, scale, and execution excellence.

About the Team

We are building a new AI team within Engineering, tasked with driving AI adoption across 1GLOBAL. The team’s mission is to make AI a practical, governed, and well-supported capability for every part of the company, from the engineers writing our software to the operations teams running the business. Beyond the internal platform, the team will contribute AI-powered capabilities to our commercial product lines. 

This is the founding leadership hire for the function. As Team Lead, you will own the engineering delivery of this function. You will hire and grow the team, set technical standards, and be accountable for the platform’s reliability, performance, and evolution. You will work closely with a dedicated product manager and report into Engineering leadership. 

About the Role

  • Lead the AI Engineering team: hire, mentor, and develop engineers while fostering a culture of ownership, quality, and continuous improvement. 
  • Own Central AI platform development and governance: AWS Bedrock fronted by an LLM gateway (LiteLLM, Portkey, or similar). Token budgets, rate limits, key management, guardrails, audit logging, observability, cost controls. 
  • Own the technical architecture of 1GLOBAL’s internal AI tools and MCP servers, including RAG pipelines, vector search, LLM integration, and conversational interfaces. 
  • Drive architectural decisions across the AI stack, balancing speed of delivery with long-term scalability and maintainability. 
  • Collaborate with product management, operations, and commercial teams to prioritize high-impact use cases and translate them into engineering plans. 
  • Establish and enforce engineering standards: code quality, testing strategies, CI/CD pipelines, monitoring, and model evaluation frameworks. 
  • Manage the full software development lifecycle for AI services, ensuring reliable production operations and clear incident response. 
  • Stay hands-on: contribute to design, code reviews, and critical implementation work, especially in the early phase of the team’s growth. 
  • Coordinate with security and compliance teams to ensure AI systems meet 1GLOBAL’s regulatory obligations (ISO 27001, GSMA SAS, data classification). 

Requirements

About You

  • 7+ years of software engineering experience, with at least 3 years in a technical leadership leading projects, mentoring engineers, setting direction.  
  • Proven ability to hire, develop, and retain strong engineering talent. You have built or significantly grown a team before. 
  • Strong backend fundamentals: API design, microservices, distributed systems, production operations. Python proficiency expected. 
  • Hands-on experience with AI gateways or model routing layers (LiteLLM, Portkey, AWS Bedrock) - guardrails, token limits, observability, cost management. 
  • Working knowledge of RAG, vector search, and LLM evaluation. Depth here is a plus, not a prerequisite. 
  • Practical experience with MCP servers, or strong fluency with similar tool-calling and agent integration patterns. 
  • Power user of AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, or similar). The kind of person who would define how an engineering organization adopts them. 
  • Comfortable with CI/CD, containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), and infrastructure-as-code.  
  • Familiarity with data security practices — PII handling, access controls, data classification. Experience in regulated environments (telecommunications, financial services, ISO 27001, GSMA SAS) is an advantage. 
  • Excellent communicator. You can align technical and non-technical stakeholders around a shared roadmap. Fluent in English. 
  • Comfortable operating in ambiguity. You will be defining the team’s ways of working, not inheriting them. 

Benefits

Why 1GLOBAL?

  • Foundational Role: Build the AI function from the ground up, setting architectural direction and engineering culture for everything that follows. 
  • Growth Opportunities: Advance your career in one of the fastest growing telecommunications companies, expanding over 100% year-on-year. 
  • Talented Team: Collaborate with experienced founders, a strong senior management team, and driven individuals across 15 countries. 
  • Dynamic Environment: Fast-paced, innovation-driven workplace where every contribution counts. 
  • International Reach: Opportunities to work across 1GLOBAL offices worldwide as you grow within the company. 


1GLOBAL is an equal opportunity employer, we value your character as much as your talent. Diversity drives our innovation, and we offer a collaborative, dynamic, and international work environment. We are excited for you to join our mission to revolutionise connectivity globally.

description_text:

1GLOBAL is a technology-driven global mobile communications provider, delivering global connectivity solutions to enterprises and consumers. Headquartered in the Netherlands, with world-class R&D hubs in Lisbon, Berlin, and São Paulo, our team of close to 500 experts across 16 countries is united by a single ambition: to redefine global mobile connectivity through technology, scale, and execution excellence.

About the Team

We are looking for a talented and driven IP Networks Team Lead to join our Technology Department. Your mission is to deliver a world-class network foundation supporting global mobile, cloud, and connectivity services.
As the IP Networks Team Lead, you will be responsible for designing, operating, and evolving our global IP backbone and data center networks, ensuring they are scalable, secure, and highly available. This role blends technical leadership and hands-on engineering, guiding the team in building and maintaining next-generation network infrastructure across our on-prem and cloud environments.
You will act as both a technical authority and people leader, responsible for defining network architecture standards, enforcing best practices, and managing priorities across multiple initiatives.
We are open to hiring this role in São Paulo, Brazil. Fluency in English is essential for this role. Please ensure your CV is submitted in English as part of your application.

About the Role

  • Lead, mentor, and develop a team of network engineers, managing performance, priorities, and technical direction.
  • Design, implement, and maintain LAN, WAN, data center, and backbone network infrastructure.
  • Architect and operate high-availability global IP networks interconnecting data centers and cloud regions.
  • Ensure network redundancy and resilience testing across service, infrastructure, and transport layers.
  • Plan and oversee SDN and SD-WAN to enable automation and dynamic traffic engineering.
  • Deploy and manage routers, switches, and firewalls.
  • Implement and maintain IPv6, QoS, and traffic-engineering policies to guarantee consistent network performance.
  • Monitor network health, performance, and capacity, ensuring high availability, low latency, and reliability.
  • Investigate complex network incidents, lead root-cause analysis, and ensure follow-up actions are implemented.
  • Ensure network security and compliance with internal policies and industry standards (ISO 27001, PCI-DSS, CIS).
  • Automate network provisioning, configuration, and monitoring using Terraform, Ansible, or similar tools.
  • Continuously improve observability and visibility using tools such as Prometheus, Grafana, and SNMP-based systems.
  • Support migrations, upgrades, and expansions while minimizing downtime and risk.
  • Maintain accurate documentation of configurations, topology diagrams, and operational procedures.
  • Generate regular network performance and incident reports with actionable recommendations.

Requirements

About You

Must Have

  • Experience: 10+ years as an IP/Networking Engineer, with expertise in designing, deploying, and managing high-availability, scalable intercontinental networks (including at least 2+ years in a leadership role).
  • Mobile IP Networks & Backhaul: Extensive experience designing and managing IP-based mobile backhaul networks for 4G/5G, ensuring seamless delivery of traffic, data, and voice services.
  • SD-WAN & SDN: Proven expertise with SD-WAN and SDN technologies like Cisco ACI or NDFC, enabling network automation and optimization of global IP backbones.
  • IPv6 & QoS: Strong experience with IPv6 deployment and QoS configuration to optimize bandwidth and ensure high-performance, reliable connectivity.
  • Data Center & Backbone Design: Skilled in designing and managing global IP backbones and interconnected data centers for high-performance, low-latency connections.
  • Advanced Network Protocols: Expert-level knowledge in TCP/IP stack, including TCP, UDP, ICMP, SMTP, SNMP, LDAP, DNS, NTP, and other essential protocols. Proficient in dynamic routing protocols like BGP, OSPF, and MPLS.
  • Network Security & Compliance: Expertise in IPSec VPNs, security hardening, and compliance frameworks (PCI-DSS, ISO27001, CIS).
  • Layer 2 & Layer 3 Management: Hands-on experience managing Layer 2 (STP, MSTP) and Layer 3 multiservice networks with MPLS and traffic engineering.
  • Network Automation & IaC: Proficient in Terraform, Ansible, and other tools to automate network provisioning and streamline deployments.
  • Network Monitoring & Observability: Expertise in tools like Prometheus, Grafana, SNMP, and Wireshark for network monitoring and performance optimization.
  • High-Performance Networking: Proven ability to design and optimize solutions for WAN optimization, traffic engineering, and latency reduction.
  • Leadership & Collaboration: Strong leadership skills in mentoring engineers, driving network strategy, and collaborating with cross-functional teams.

Nice to Have

  • Knowledge of Python for network automation, data collection, or tooling development.
  • Hands-on experience with redundancy validation, chaos testing, or network failover simulation.
  • Familiarity with multi-cloud networking and hybrid-connectivity architectures.
  • Experience integrating network telemetry into performance and reliability dashboards.
  • Experience collaborating with global carriers, IXPs, and data center providers.

Benefits

What we offer?

  • CLT contract — enjoy job stability and reliable benefits that value your work
  • Quarterly performance bonuses to reward your hard work and achievements
  • Meal allowance paid into Caju card — R$100 per working day
  • Extended parental leave - 180 days of maternity leave and 20 days of paternity leave.
  • Health insurance with SulAmérica — 50% covered by the company
  • Daycare allowance provided to mothers with children under 3 years old — R$500 per month per child

Why 1GLOBAL?

  • Major Transaction Exposure: Be in the driver’s seat for transactions that will have an impact on the future telco industry.
  • Work with a Talented Team: From the Board and the Founders to the Senior Management Team, you will collaborate daily with the most capable and renowned external advisors, and constantly being exposed to talented and driven individuals.

Digital & Social Content

title: Product Content & Demo Specialist - Identity Security
description_text:
About 1Kosmos

1Kosmos is the leader in passwordless authentication and identity verification, providing a unified platform that combines biometric authentication, identity verification, and lifecycle management. We help organizations eliminate passwords, reduce fraud, and deliver seamless user experiences while maintaining the highest security standards. Since our founding, we've grown to serve Fortune 500 companies and government agencies worldwide, delivering cutting-edge identity solutions that protect millions of users.

We are a community of innovators, problem-solvers, and passionate builders who are redefining how organizations approach digital identity. If you're driven by the opportunity to eliminate security vulnerabilities while improving user experience, join us in our mission to create a passwordless future and secure digital identities at scale.

Product Content & Demo Specialist — Identity Security

About the Role We're looking for a creative, technically curious storyteller to bring 1Kosmos product capabilities to life. In this role, you'll translate complex identity security features — from passwordless authentication to biometric identity proofing — into compelling content and demo videos that resonate with enterprise buyers, IT teams, and government audiences.

What You'll Do

  • Produce demo videos showcasing 1Kosmos capabilities (e.g., LiveID, Verification, 1Key, Authentication workflows) for use in sales cycles, marketing campaigns, and customer onboarding
  • Create feature walkthroughs for new product releases, integrations (Okta, Entra ID, CyberArk, etc.), and use-case scenarios
  • Develop written content — solution briefs, how-to guides, capability one-pagers, and blog posts — translating technical features into business value
  • Partner with Product and Engineering to deeply understand new capabilities before each release
  • Maintain a content library of up-to-date demo environments, screen recordings, and enablement assets
  • Support sales and pre-sales with custom demo videos and tailored capability showcases

What You Bring

  • 3–5 years of experience in product marketing, technical content, or developer marketing — ideally in SaaS cybersecurity, IAM, or identity
  • Hands-on experience creating screen-recorded demos and explainer videos (Loom, Camtasia, Adobe Premiere, or similar)
  • Strong written communication skills — able to simplify technical concepts for both technical and business audiences
  • Familiarity with IAM concepts (SSO, MFA, passwordless, identity proofing) is a strong plus
  • Comfortable working in a fast-paced, high-growth environment with short release cycles

Nice to Have

  • Prior experience supporting a B2B SaaS sales team with demo content

Why 1Kosmos

  • Ranked #1 Workforce Product Score in Gartner Critical Capabilities for Identity Verification (2025)
  • $57M Series B — high-growth stage with strong product-market fit
  • Work on one of the most critical technology problems of our time: stopping identity fraud and account takeover at enterprise scale

Benefits

The Benefits of Working with 1Kosmos

· Competitive salary with significant upside as we scale and grow.

· Comprehensive benefits: Medical, dental, and vision coverage, FSA/HSA, 401(k), and more.

· Generous equipment budget and customized workstation—you'll have everything you need to be successful.

· Long-term stability within a high-growth sector in identity and access management.

· Mission-driven culture: At 1Kosmos, your work directly impacts the security and success of leading organizations worldwide. Everything we build is cutting-edge and vital to our clients' success.

· Flexibility & work-life balance: Hybrid work model with remote flexibility.

Note

This is a hybrid role with 2-3 days onsite at our Iselin, NJ headquarters.

H1B/Visa sponsorship is not currently available for this specific position.

1Kosmos is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

title: Social Strategy Director (Mat Cover - 13 months)
description_text:
STRATEGY, DATA & SOCIAL TEAM AT 1000HEADS 

The Strategy, Data & Social team at 1000heads answers critical questions that begin with WHY, are validated by WHAT the data tells us, and are delivered through HOW brands show up on social.

If you are curious by nature, driven to uncover meaningful insights, enjoy connecting data with creativity, and thrive on turning complexity into clear, engaging direction, you'll fit right in.

  • Strategic content, media, and campaign planning

  • Insight generation and data analysis to inform ideation
  • Trend analysis, social listening, and cultural understanding
  • Platform, channel, and social editorial expertise
  • Client workshops, strategic frameworks, and alignment sessions
  • KPI definition, measurement frameworks, and success metrics
  • Paid media planning, activation, and optimisation
  • Post-campaign evaluation, learning, and optimisation

In addition to integrated account support, the team delivers bespoke strategic engagements designed to help clients better understand their audience, brand, category, and social performance, combining strategic thinking, data-driven insight, and social-first expertise to drive stronger business outcomes.

SUMMARY OF THE ROLE WE’RE LOOKING TO FILL AT 1000HEADS APAC

1000heads APAC is looking for an experienced Social Strategy Director to lead our Strategy, Data & Social function across the region during a 13-month maternity leave cover period.

This role acts as the strategic lead for the agency, overseeing a team of Social Strategists and Social Creative Specialists while serving as the senior strategic advisor to both clients and internal teams.

You will be responsible for shaping the strategic direction of the agency's work, ensuring excellence across all strategic output, and driving the integration of social-first thinking throughout client engagements. You will lead the development of innovative strategies, frameworks, and approaches that help clients navigate an increasingly complex social landscape.

As department lead, you'll oversee team development, resource planning, capability growth, and ways of working. You'll partner closely with Client Services, Creative, Media and Leadership teams to ensure strategy is embedded across the agency and consistently delivers commercial value.

Beyond client work, you'll play a critical role in the future growth of the business, contributing to new business opportunities, thought leadership, product development, and agency positioning. You will be a trusted strategic voice within the leadership team, helping steer agency direction and identify opportunities for growth and innovation.

This role offers the opportunity to shape the future of social strategy at 1000heads APAC while leading strategic partnerships with some of the world's most recognised brands.

RESPONSIBILITIES

Department leadership & team management

    • Lead and manage the Strategy, Data & Social team across APAC
    • Set strategic standards, methodologies, and best practices across the department
    • Oversee workload management, team utilisation, and resource allocation
    • Mentor and develop strategists and social creative specialists, supporting career growth and capability development
    • Foster a culture of curiosity, collaboration, innovation, and continuous learning
    • Drive recruitment (if needed), onboarding, and succession planning where required
    • Champion strategic excellence and ensure quality control across all outputs

Strategic leadership

    • Act as the agency's senior strategic authority and trusted advisor
    • Lead the development of complex social-first strategies, communications frameworks, and audience approaches
    • Guide strategic thinking across integrated campaigns, always-on social programs, and bespoke consultancy projects
    • Ensure all strategic recommendations are grounded in insight, audience understanding, cultural relevance, and measurable business outcomes
    • Lead workshops, stakeholder alignment sessions, and strategic planning engagements

Client leadership & strategic counsel

    • Build trusted relationships with senior client stakeholders
    • Act as executive strategic lead across key agency accounts
    • Present strategic recommendations and thought leadership to C-suite and senior decision makers
    • Provide proactive strategic guidance that helps clients solve business challenges through social and digital channels
    • Identify opportunities to expand strategic scope and deepen client partnerships

Research, insights & measurement

    • Oversee the development of insight led strategies informed by social listening, research, audience analysis, and performance data
    • Ensure robust measurement frameworks are in place across all client programmes
    • Drive innovation in reporting, insight generation, and strategic effectiveness measurement
    • Champion the use of data and evidence based decision making throughout the agency
    • Stay ahead of platform evolution, consumer behaviour shifts, and emerging trends

New business & agency growth

    • Play a leadership role in agency new business efforts
    • Lead strategic responses to RFPs, pitches, and growth opportunities
    • Develop compelling strategic narratives and agency propositions
    • Identify emerging market opportunities and areas for service expansion
    • Contribute to agency thought leadership, marketing initiatives, and industry visibility
    • Partner with leadership to help shape the future direction of the business

Cross functional leadership

    • Partner closely with Client Services, Creative, and Production teams
    • Ensure strategic alignment across all client work and agency initiatives
    • Support integrated planning and collaboration across disciplines
    • Advocate for social-first thinking throughout the agency
    • Act as a key member of the APAC leadership team

Your first priority will be to do your job to the best of your abilities.  Your second priority will be to help those around you to do their job to the best of their abilities.

This job description is not intended to cover everything that will be expected of you but rather to act as a guide and you may be required to get involved in other and reasonable ad hoc projects.

Requirements

    • 10+ years experience in social strategy, communications planning, and insight-led consulting roles
    • Proven experience leading high-performing teams
    • Strong commercial acumen and experience contributing to business growth
    • Demonstrated success leading major client relationships and influencing senior stakeholders
    • Deep expertise across social platforms, audience behaviour, culture, and digital ecosystems
    • Exceptional strategic thinking and problem-solving abilities
    • Outstanding storytelling, presentation, and workshop facilitation skills
    • Strong understanding of research methodologies, social listening, audience analysis, and measurement frameworks
    • Experience developing agency-wide strategic frameworks, products, or methodologies
    • Ability to balance strategic leadership, people management, and commercial priorities
    • Confidence operating at both a high-level business perspective and detailed strategic execution level
    • Experience working within agency environments across multiple clients and industries
    • Passion for mentoring and developing talent

Benefits

About 1000HEADS

1000heads combines expertise in data & analytics, strategy, technology and creativity to help the world’s best businesses build Social Age brands. 1000heads provides a fully integrated, end-to-end Social Transformation™ proposition to blue-chip clients encompassing data & analytics, strategy and implementation. 1000heads has a global footprint, employing over 200 people across 12 offices in London, New York, Los Angeles, Miami, Chicago, Bogota, Sydney, Melbourne, Kuala Lumpur, Tokyo, Paris and Berlin. 1000heads’ clients include Alphabet, Keurig, The North Face, San Pellegrino, Amazon, Cisco, and Diageo.

1000heads is an Equal Opportunities Employer, we are passionately committed to working together to promote an inclusive environment which celebrates and promotes diversity. We are committed to our belief that diversity in our team generates better and bolder ideas, creativity, understanding and respect. We welcome applicants irrespective of age, sex, race, ethnicity, disability and other factors that have no bearing on an individual’s ability to perform their job.

For more information on 1000heads, visit 1000heads.com.

title: Senior DevOps Engineer - Linux Infrastructure (Lisbon Based)
description_text:
About Us

1GLOBAL is a technology-driven global mobile communications provider, delivering global connectivity solutions to enterprises and consumers. Powered by a best-in-class telecom platform – including its own owned and operated global mobile core network, fully fledged in-house developed eSIM technology, and an extensive portfolio of telecom licenses – 1GLOBAL operates as a fully regulated telecommunications provider across 40 countries worldwide.


We serve many of the world’s leading banks, enterprises, and digital-first businesses, including neo-banks, global fast moving consumer goods companies, travel leaders, and payment service providers. Today, 1GLOBAL connects more than 70 million people and devices globally, enabling our customers to launch, scale, and innovate with confidence in the mobile ecosystem.


1GLOBAL is a profitable, fast-growing business. With full-year revenues in 2025 exceeding US$200 million and profits of over US$25 million, we generate strong cash flows to fund our growth allowing us to continuously invest in infrastructure, platform innovation, and global expansion. Recent years have marked a defining phase in our journey, with major enterprise and mass-consumer client wins accelerating our evolution into a global mobile connectivity powerhouse, purpose-built to enable consumer brands to enter and succeed with their own  aspirations to offer telecommunications services to their clients.


Founded in 2022 by experienced technology entrepreneurs, Hakan Koç and Pyrros Koussios, 1GLOBAL has rapidly emerged as a European technology leader shaping the future of global telecommunications. We operate as a fully regulated Mobile Virtual Network Operator (MVNO) in 12 countries and as a regulated telecom operator in an additional 28 markets. Headquartered in the Netherlands, with world-class R&D hubs in Lisbon, Berlin, and São Paulo, our team of close to 500 experts across 15 countries is united by a single ambition: to redefine global mobile connectivity through technology, scale, and execution excellence.

About the Team

We are looking for a talented DevOps Engineer with a focus on Cloud and On-prem infrastructure to join our Technology Department in Lisbon.

As a DevOps Engineer, you will design, deploy, and manage our runtime infrastructure, ensuring it is secure, scalable, and cost-efficient. You will plan and implement our container orchestration and service mesh architecture, maintain multi-account AWS Organisation setups, and automate tasks to eliminate human intervention in repetitive processes. Your role includes regular system monitoring, performing maintenance, managing software patches and upgrades, and ensuring optimal observability and performance of systems and applications. You will also investigate and resolve infrastructure issues and create comprehensive documentation for peers and users.

Fluency in English is essential for this role. Please ensure your CV is submitted in English as part of your application.

About the Role

  • Own the Core OS: Design, harden, and lifecycle-manage our Linux distributions across both VMs and cloud environments.
  • Bridge the Stack: Architect and maintain the integration between traditional on-premises hardware (compute, storage, networking) and our AWS multi-account footprint.
  • Low-Level Optimization: Think about scale and reliability at the system level, focusing on kernel tuning, I/O performance, and resource isolation.
  • Infrastructure Evolution: Plan the migration or hybrid-connectivity path between traditional VM-based workloads and container orchestration (K8s/Service Mesh).
  • Hybrid Observability: Maintain unified visibility across physical hardware health and high-level application metrics (logs, Prometheus metrics, and traces).
  • Eliminate Toil: Automate routine systems administration (patching, provisioning, backups) to ensure a "hands-off" datacenter experience.
  • Disaster Recovery: Manage high-availability and DR strategies, including off-site backups, hardware redundancy, and stateful data integrity. 

Requirements

About You

  • Linux Mastery: 5+ years of deep Linux systems engineering (RHEL/CentOS, Debian/Ubuntu). You should be comfortable with the CLI, boot process, LVM, and systemd.
  • Network & Storage Savvy: Solid understanding of TCP/IP networking, VLANs, load balancing (HAProxy), and storage protocols (NFS, iSCSI, SAN).
  • Virtualization Expert: Heavy experience with virtualized environments, including resource allocation and performance troubleshooting.
  • Modern Orchestration: Proficient in Docker and Kubernetes (EKS), with the ability to explain how containers interact with the underlying Linux kernel (cgroups/namespaces).
  • Automation Architect: Expertise in Ansible for configuration management and Terraform for managing both cloud resources and on-prem providers.
  • Scripting: Advanced proficiency in Bash and Python for automating system tasks and data processing.
  • Security Mindset: Knowledge of OS hardening (SELinux/AppArmor), SSH key management, and internal compliance auditing.

Benefits

Why 1GLOBAL?

  • Growth Opportunities: Advance your career in one of the fastest growing telecommunications companies, expanding over 100% year-on-year under the leadership of successful tech entrepreneurs.
  • Major Transaction Exposure: Be in the driver’s seat for transactions that will have an impact on the future telco industry.

title: Test Automation Engineer
description_text:
Test Automation Engineer (QA)

Experience: 5+

Description:

We are seeking a detail-oriented Test Automation Engineer to ensure the quality, reliability, and compliance of all our releases. This role involves designing and executing test plans, identifying bugs, and collaborating with development teams and stakeholders to deliver high-quality software solutions, as well as implementing and maintaining reliable, efficient test automation.

Key Responsibilities:

· Actively participate in grooming and planning; review requirements and design documentation to provide feedback and ask clarifying questions

· Develop, document, and execute test plans and test cases

· Perform functional, regression, integration, exploratory, and performance testing

· Identify, track, and report software defects using issue tracking tools (Jira)

· Collaborate with developers, product managers, and other stakeholders to ensure test coverage and resolve issues

· Automate tests that are reliable and efficient

· Create and automate API tests

· Ensure compliance with quality standards and best practices

· Work closely with Development Engineers to understand impact of changes to plan regression

· Utilize available Gen AI tools to support all processes, i.e., creating test strategies, tests, baseline automation, etc.

· Work collaboratively with cross-functional global teams

Requirements

Required Qualifications:

· 5+ years of experience in software QA/testing in Agile environment

· 3+ years of experience in test automation

· 2+ years of experience with API testing and tools (i.e., Swagger, Postman, Newman)

· Strong knowledge of QA methodologies, tools, and processes

· Experience with automated testing tools and scripting languages (Playwright, JavaScript, JMeter, K6)

· Understanding of database management systems

· Familiarity with Agile/Scrum development practices

· Experience with CI/CD pipelines (i.e., Jenkins, GitHub Actions) and DevOps practices

· Experience creating and automating API tests (Postman, Newman)

· Knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP)

· Experience using Large Language Models (LLMs) or other AI tools for tasks such as creating draft of test cases, test strategies, etc.

· Experience with security tools such as Snyk or Wiz is a plus

· Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent experience

Skills & Competencies

· Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and critical thinking skills

· Excellent communication (written and verbal) and collaboration abilities

· Excellent attention to detail and commitment to quality

· Ability to work independently, yet transparently

· Ability to work efficiently in a fast-paced environment; adapt to changing priorities while maintaining quality

· Ability to follow all guidelines and standards without fail

· Ability to stay current with industry trends and technology and to use that knowledge to make recommendations for improvements in process, testing, and test automation
