We are hiring a Strategy & Operations Manager to work closely with the Chief Marketing Officer, focused on scaling and operationalising our B2B2C business, where enterprise partners launch consumer-facing mobile products powered by 1GLOBAL’s platform.

This role sits at the centre of one of the company’s highest-priority growth areas. You will combine strategic thinking with hands-on execution, ensuring that partner launches, commercial initiatives, and cross-functional programmes move from plan to delivery with speed and precision.

You will operate at the intersection of commercial, product, finance, and legal, translating signed partner agreements into executable, scalable operational structures.

The right person for this role gets energy from making complex things work: comfortable with ambiguity, decisive with incomplete information, and known for following through. You can zoom out to see the strategic picture and zoom in to fix the process that's slowing a product launch down.

What You'll Be Doing

Once a partner deal is signed, you own getting it live. You run point across product, commercial, and legal during the launch: the one who notices a blocker three weeks before it would otherwise surface and pulls in the right people to resolve it.

You'll also be pulled into the kind of analysis that shapes a decision: sizing a new partner or market opportunity, stress testing a commercial model, or working out why a reporting number doesn't tie out.

And when you notice the same problem getting solved from scratch each time, whether that's a launch checklist that only lives in one person's head or a commercial report rebuilt every quarter, you're the one who turns it into a repeatable process.

Requirements

About You 

Must Have

  • 2+ years of experience in a high-performance environment such as management consulting, investment banking, or a fast-scaling technology company. 
  • Strong project management: proven ability to run multiple workstreams simultaneously, with real accountability for outcomes, without dropping the ball.
  • Strong analytical skills and comfort working with data to support decisions. 
  • Excellent written and verbal communication, with the ability to distil complexity into clear, compelling narratives. 
  • Confident operating with ambiguity, able to define structure where none exists and act without waiting for perfect information. 
  • A track record of taking full ownership of complex projects and seeing them through to completion. 
  • Strong interpersonal skills and the ability to influence and align stakeholders without direct authority.
  • A natural inclination to systematise: if you see a process that relies on tribal knowledge or heroic effort, your instinct is to document it, improve it, and make it repeatable.

Nice to Have

  • Exposure to platform-to-partner commercial models in fintech, telecom, or consumer apps.
  • Experience working in or alongside a commercial or go-to-market function.
  • Exposure to regulated industries or complex partner ecosystems, where legal and compliance requirements shape how fast something can launch.

Recent years have marked a defining phase in our journey, with major enterprise and mass-consumer client wins accelerating our evolution into a global mobile connectivity powerhouse, purpose-built to enable consumer brands to enter and succeed with their own  aspirations to offer telecommunications services to their clients.


Founded in 2022 by experienced technology entrepreneurs, Hakan Koç and Pyrros Koussios, 1GLOBAL has rapidly emerged as a European technology leader shaping the future of global telecommunications. We operate as a fully regulated Mobile Virtual Network Operator (MVNO) in 12 countries and as a regulated telecom operator in an additional 28 markets. Headquartered in the Netherlands, with world-class R&D hubs in Lisbon, Berlin, and São Paulo, our team of close to 500 experts across 15 countries is united by a single ambition: to redefine global mobile connectivity through technology, scale, and execution excellence.


About the Team
We are seeking an experienced and dynamic Enterprise Salesperson who has a love of disruptive innovation to join our team and in the Berlin, Germany. The ideal candidate will have 2-4+ years in complex sales processes, tech sales or solutions sales, selling IT workplace items to large companies; with entrepreneurial mindset who speaks fluent German (native speaker level). As a key player in our sales team, you will drive the growth of our enterprise customer base, leveraging your expertise to build lasting relationships and deliver tailored solutions that meet the unique needs of large organizations. 


About the Role

  • Develop and execute a strategic sales plan to achieve sales targets and expand our enterprise customer base. 
  • Identify and prospect new business opportunities within the enterprise sector. 
  • Build and maintain strong, long-lasting customer relationships with key decision-makers and stakeholders. 
  • Conduct in-depth needs analysis to understand customer requirements and provide customized solutions. 
  • Present and demonstrate our products and services to potential clients, highlighting their value and benefits. 
  • Negotiate contracts and close deals to achieve sales objectives. 
  • Collaborate with internal teams to ensure seamless delivery and implementation of solutions. 
  • Stay up-to-date with industry trends, market conditions, and competitor activities. 
  • Provide regular sales reports and forecasts to management. 

Requirements

About You 

  • 2+ years of successful B2B sales experience in tech 
  • Fluent German speaking and writing (Native Speaker level) 
  • Proven track record of meeting or exceeding sales targets. 
  • Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills. 
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities. 
  • Ability to build and maintain relationships with C-level executives and decision-makers. 
  • Self-motivated, goal-oriented, and able to work independently as well as part of a team. 
  • Familiarity with global communications solutions is a plus. 
  • Experience in Enterprise Sales us a plus 

Benefits

Why 1GLOBAL?

  • Growth Opportunities: Advance your career in one of the fastest growing telecommunications companies, expanding over 100% year-on-year under the leadership of successful tech entrepreneurs.
  • Major Transaction Exposure: Be in the driver’s seat for transactions that will have an impact on the future telco industry.
  • Work with a Talented Team: From the Board and the Founders to the Senior Management Team, you will collaborate daily with the most capable and renowned external advisors, and constantly being exposed to talented and driven individuals.
  • Dynamic Work Environment: Thrive in a collaborative, fast-paced workplace where innovation is encouraged, and every contribution counts.
  • Professional Development: Work alongside industry experts to enhance your skills and knowledge in a cutting-edge field.
  • International Experience: Gain opportunities to work in different 1GLOBAL offices around the world as you grow within the company.
  • Open Communication Culture: Join a team where your ideas are heard, and open dialogue is encouraged, fostering a supportive and transparent work environment.
  • Get Things Done Attitude: Be part of a results-driven team that values efficiency, creativity, and the drive to make a tangible impact in the industry.


1GLOBAL is an equal opportunity employer, we value your character as much as your talent. Diversity drives our innovation, and we offer a collaborative, dynamic, and international work environment. We are excited for you to join our mission to revolutionise connectivity globally.

title: Chinese DTP freelancers
description_text:

Then the client will import the files into CAT tools for translation.

The Chinese files have specific instructions in Chinese.  

Requirements

Task: DTP

Location: China or abroad

Capacity/file:

We need to finish around 300 pages per day if we can.

The DTPers can only work with Word files.

Benefits

Interested candidates should submit their resume along with a cover letter detailing their specific experience in the relevant content and their proficiency in the languages mentioned, or proof of meeting the requirements.

Applications should be sent to haffy@1stopasia.com.

Looking forward to hearing from you soon.
